channel.title: Ballard Farmers Market
channel.description: Upcoming events for Ballard Farmers Market

item.title: Ballard Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Ballard Ave NW between 20th Ave NW & 22nd Ave NW, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market on Ballard Avenue NW. One of Seattle's largest and most popular markets with local produce, prepared foods, and crafts.

Event details
